form.formComment: At the latest run sat on speed throughout when 3rd of 7 at this track on March 12 over 1006m, 1.1 len behind Waittilmidnitehour with 55kg at $3.30. Before that eased back early on 5th of 10 at Gulfstream Park Turf on February 20 over 1006m, 3 len behind Sod Siren carrying 55kg at $17.20. Thereabouts last time out. Definite top-three prospect.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after nine months 4th of 7 at this track on March 12 over 1006m, 1.75 len behind Waittilmidnitehour carrying 55kg at $8.60. form.formComment: Mare back from a spell of four months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last preparation third of 7 at this track December 18 over 1106m, 1.75 len behind Denver's Alley carrying 54.5kg at $6.20. When resuming last campaign second of 10 at Gulfstream Park Turf April 10 over 1609m, 1.75 len behind Carrington carrying 56.5kg at $2.30. Bold performance expected.
